channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Channel 4 withdraws MAFS UK from streaming amid contributor welfare review
item.description: Channel 4 has removed all past seasons of 'Married at First Sight UK' from its streaming services following serious allegations of misconduct involving a small number of former participants. The broad...

item.title: US Jury Rules Against Elon Musk in OpenAI Lawsuit Over Founding Dispute
item.description: On 18th May 2026, a US jury in Oakland, California gave a unanimous verdict against Elon Musk in his lawsuit against OpenAI, saying the company is not liable for allegedly deviating from its original ...

item.title: Trump-Backed Navy SEAL Candidate Ed Gallrein Accused of Inflating Bronze Star Count in Challenge to Rep. Thomas Massie
item.description: Ed Gallrein, a retired Navy SEAL and Republican congressional candidate endorsed by President Donald Trump to unseat Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky's 4th District, has responded angrily to a Daily Cal...

item.title: Authorities warn 20 families in Rodriguez, Rizal about rockslide danger
item.description: Authorities in Rodriguez, Rizal have raised concerns over the safety of 20 families residing in areas prone to rockslides. The local government, in coordination with disaster risk management teams, ha...

item.title: Police search for driver after woman injured in alleged road rage hit-and-run at Alyth Golf Club
item.description: Police in Scotland are appealing for information following a hit-and-run incident in Alyth, Perthshire, where a woman was struck by a van after an apparent road rage confrontation. The event occurred ...

item.title: JD Vance recalls Trump criticizing his shamrock socks during St. Patrick’s Day visit
item.description: During a recent event in Kansas City, U.S. Vice President JD Vance shared a story highlighting former President Donald Trump's strict dress preferences. Vance recounted that last St. Patrick's Day, he...

item.title: DepEd Secures 32,916 Additional Teaching Positions Ahead of School Opening
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has announced that 32,916 new teaching positions have been approved, just in time for the public school opening on June 8. Education Secretary Sonny Angara stated t...

item.title: Arsenal seeks victory over Burnley to maintain control of Premier League title race
item.description: Arsenal will face Burnley in a pivotal Premier League fixture as they aim to keep the title race firmly in their own hands. Currently two points ahead of Manchester City, the Gunners know that a victo...

item.title: Federal budget changes could increase stamp duty costs for small businesses
item.description: The federal budget has introduced tax changes affecting trusts that could force small and medium enterprises (SMEs) to restructure their financial affairs. These restructures may trigger significant s...

item.title: DP Kindiki Explains Measures to Cushion Kenyans from Skyrocketing Fuel Prices
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has come out to clarify the situation following the violent protests in parts of Kenya over rising fuel prices. He blamed the unrest on political leaders exploiting pu...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM C. Joseph Vijay Pledges Support to Tamil Diaspora on Mullivaikkal Day
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay on Monday extended his solidarity to the global Tamil diaspora on the occasion of Mullivaikkal Remembrance Day. Through a social media post on 'X', the leader...

item.title: Jose Mourinho set to return as Real Madrid manager amid squad tensions
item.description: Jose Mourinho is poised to return to Real Madrid, thirteen years after a bitter departure that saw him clash with players and management. The 63-year-old, currently managing Benfica in Portugal, has a...

item.title: Cate Blanchett reflects on the decline of the #MeToo movement and evolving accountability in Hollywood
item.description: At the 2026 Cannes Film Festival, actress Cate Blanchett spoke candidly about the state of the #MeToo movement in Hollywood, expressing concern that its momentum was lost quickly. She highlighted the ...

item.title: Rising living costs drive more American families to live in multigenerational homes
item.description: A growing trend in the United States shows families increasingly choosing to live in multigenerational households as financial pressures mount. Recent data from Realtor.com indicates that over the pas...

item.title: Bond Yields Surge as Market Reacts to Federal Budget Spending Concerns
item.description: Australian bond markets have reacted sharply to the latest federal budget, with 10-year government bond yields spiking to a 15-year high. Market veteran Richard Coppleson, author of the widely read Co...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Missing Congressman While Office Continues Sending Newsletters
item.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr., a New Jersey Republican, has been absent from Congress for 74 days, missing 68 votes and not appearing publicly. His office has attributed the absence to a 'personal health matter,'...

item.title: Three people found dead in Campbelltown home, police launch major investigation
item.description: On Monday evening, emergency services responded to a property on Raymond Avenue in Campbelltown, located in Sydney’s south-west, after three people were found dead. Police have cordoned off the two-st...

item.title: India strengthens Ebola monitoring and public health readiness after WHO alert
item.description: India has proactively enhanced its surveillance and preparedness measures across airports, seaports, and the national public health system in response to the World Health Organization declaring Ebola ...

item.title: Citroën Launches Compact C3 Hola Panel Van in South Africa
item.description: The Citroën C3 Hola panel van has officially launched in South Africa, targeting small business owners and urban delivery operators. This compact van comes with a fully enclosed cargo bay capable of c...

item.title: Durban flood victims in KZN move into permanent homes after four-year wait
item.description: After four long years of living in transitional accommodation following the 2022 floods, families in Durban’s KwaZulu-Natal province are finally moving into permanent homes in Cornubia. The KZN Depart...
